title: Community Shelters * Homeless Youth - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > Community Shelters * Homeless Youth 3 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Ex-Offenders Homeless Couples Homeless Families Homeless Men Homeless Veterans Homeless Women Homeless Youth Mothers Pregnant Individuals Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CLATSOP COMMUNITY ACTION COLUMBIA INN EMERGENCY SHELTER COLUMBIA INN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a community shelter with up to 64 beds. 495 Marine Drive Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Families with children experiencing homelessness, individuals and families escaping domestic violence, and youth age 18-24 Prioritizes families with children, individuals with mobility-affecting disabilities, and individuals who are part of the Latinx, 2SLGBTQIA+, and Veteran communities Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 8:30am-3:30pm Shelter: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 325-1400 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LANE COUNTY HUMAN SERVICE DIVISION LANE COUNTY SHELTER FINDER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a shelter locator with bed availability in Lane County. Not all shelters in Lane County are listed. 151 W 7th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Varies by shelter Hours: Not applicable Get Directions Visit Website More Details LIFEBOAT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a community shelter. Guests will be served a hot meal and have access to showers, laundry, toilietries, a clothing closet. phone and internet access, socks, and underwear. Maximum capacity is 22 individuals and beds are available on a first-come, first-serve basis. 1040 Commercial Street Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older, emancipated youth, and families with minor children Hours: Intake: 7 days per week 6pm-6am Check-in: 7 days per week 6pm-8pm Email (503) 468-8176 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CLATSOP COMMUNITY ACTION COLUMBIA INN LANE COUNTY HUMAN SERVICE DIVISION LANE COUNTY SHELTER FINDER LIFEBOAT SERVICES LIFEBOAT SERVICES
